---
layout: "default"
title: "vrm_character_demo"
workspace_data: ""
---

Complete port of the Three.js VRM demo.

**Logic Implemented:**
1. Character & Animation loading.
2. State-driven interaction (Press Space/A to Attack).
3. Animation retargeting via Mixamo bone mapping.
4. Dynamic object spawning at character bone position ("Right Hand").
5. Trajectory calculation based on camera forward direction.
6. Impulse-based physics simulation.
